=== Artichokes ===
Category: vegetables

Care:
  Sun: full_sun | Water: high
  Spacing: 42.0 inches
  Height: 48.0 inches
  Days to harvest: 93
  Temperature min: air 50.0°F, ground 50.0°F
  Soil NPK: N=0.6, P=0.6, K=0.8
  Growth notes: Consistent moisture, well-drained soil.
  Post-harvest soil: Mulch with straw or leaves.
  Outdoor sow: After last frost
  Harvest timing: Harvest buds when they are firm.

Companion plants: Peas, Sunflowers, Tarragon
Antagonist plants: Potatoes, Tomatoes

Pests:
  - Aphids: Sticky residue, yellowing leaves.. Treatment: Neem oil, insecticidal soap..
  - Slugs: Ragged holes on leaves.. Treatment: Beer traps, handpick slugs..
  - Artichoke plume moth: Damaged buds.. Treatment: Bacillus thuringiensis (Bt), remove affected buds..

Diseases:
  - Botrytis blight: Grey mold on buds.. Treatment: Remove infected parts, improve air circulation..
  - Verticillium wilt: Yellowing, wilting.. Treatment: Crop rotation, remove infected plants..
  - Downy mildew: Yellow spots on leaves.. Treatment: Fungicide, ensure proper spacing for airflow..
